untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of 'important price levels' (support/resistance, swing highs/lows) and 'tiny candles' relative sizing logic that cannot be precisely operationalized with allowed indicators alone. Buffer magnitude and candle size thresholds are marked AUTHOR_SILENT with no quantitative guidance provided.
translation_notes: Approximated using pivot points as important levels, body size relative to ATR for 'tiny candle' detection, and range expansion for breakout confirmation. Stop loss buffer set to 2.0% as reasonable default. Direction kept CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to support both long and short entry logic based on breakout direction. Exit conditions use reversal below/above pivot as reasonable opposite-direction signal per rule 8.
